_note: This is a sample report illustrating the output format. Real reports are saved in db/sessions/.
readinessLabel: Can manage most situations but needs structured coaching on negotiation, complaint control, or collections.

responses.questionText: How would you ensure timely delivery in a congested traffic situation during RMX dispatch?
responses.transcript: First I will check GPS to see where TMs are. Then I will call the customer and give realistic ETA. I will also coordinate with logistics for alternative route. If delay is more than one hour I will escalate to plant manager.

evaluation.whyThisScore: Candidate showed practical RMX-grounded thinking with GPS check, customer communication, and escalation trigger. Minor gap: no mention of checking site readiness to avoid TM waiting charges at destination.
evaluation.whatWasGood: Proactive GPS check, realistic ETA communication, route coordination, and clear escalation threshold.
evaluation.whatWasMissing: Should also check if site is ready to receive concrete on arrival — TM waiting at site compounds the delay cost.
evaluation.managerCoachingNote: Coach on the full loop: dispatch delay → site readiness check → waiting charge control. Good instinct on customer communication.
